title: cyperus constrictus
intro: Cyperus constrictus, also known as Purple Papyrus or Hine, is a type of sedge plant native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Cyperus constrictus include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and is also used in herbal preparations such as creams and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
